name: CECO ENVIRONMENTAL CORP
sic_description: Industrial & Commercial Fans & Blowers & Air Purifing Equip
summary: CECO Environmental Corp is an industrial company focused on air quality, fluid handling, and industrial filtration solutions. The company provides products and services to help industrial facilities comply with environmental regulations, controlling air pollution and managing fluid processes. CECO serves diverse industries including energy, petrochemical, and manufacturing sectors through engineered equipment and solutions.
